zh.Leybourne, Kent, England: 英國英格蘭肯特萊波恩
zh.Leybourne, Malling, Kent, England: 英國英格蘭肯特萊波恩

zh.lifeSummary: William de Leybourne於大約1242年出生在英國英格蘭肯特萊波恩。他於1265年10月16日之前與Juliana de Sandwich在英國英格蘭肯特萊波恩結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1300年登記服兵役。他去世於1310年3月12日在英國肯特韋斯特 馬林享年69歲，埋葬在英國肯特韋斯特 馬林。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: William de Leybourne于大约1242年出生在英国英格兰肯特萊波恩。他于1265年10月16日之前与Juliana de Sandwich在英国英格兰肯特萊波恩结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他于1300年登记服兵役。他去世于1310年3月12日在英国肯特韋斯特 馬林享年69岁，埋葬在英国肯特韋斯特 馬林。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Leybourne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Laybourne
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from Leyburn in Yorkshire. The placename probably derives from Old English hlēg ‘shelter’ + burna ‘spring, stream’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: William de Leybourne was born about 1242, in Leybourne, Kent, England, United Kingdom. He married Juliana de Sandwich before 16 October 1265, in Leybourne, Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. He registered for military service in 1300. He died on 12 March 1310, in West Malling, Kent, England, at the age of 69, and was buried in West Malling, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: William de Leybourne est né environ 1242, à Leybourne, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il a épousé Juliana de Sandwich avant 16 octobre 1265, à Leybourne, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1300. Il est décédé le 12 mars 1310, à West Malling, Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterré à West Malling, Kent, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: William de Leybourne wurde um 1242 in Leybourne, Kent, England, United Kingdom geboren. Er hat vor 16. Oktober 1265 in Leybourne, Kent, England, United Kingdom Juliana de Sandwich geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er hat sich 1300 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 12. März 1310 im Alter von 69 Jahren in West Malling, Kent, England und wurde in West Malling, Kent, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: William de Leybourne è nato il circa 1242 nel Leybourne, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lui sposato Juliana de Sandwich prima del 16 ottobre 1265, nel Leybourne, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1300. Morì il 12 marzo 1310, nel West Malling, Kent, England, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolto a West Malling, Kent, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Leybourneは約1242年にイギリスイギリスケントリーボウルンで生まれた。1265年10月16日以前にイギリスイギリスケントリーボウルンでJuliana de Sandwichと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1300年に兵役登録をした。彼は1310年3月12日にイギリスケントウエスト マリングで69歳で死去し，イギリスケントウエスト マリングにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Leybourne(은)는 대략 1242년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 리보우른에서 태어났다. 그는 1265년 10월 16일 이전 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 리보우른에서 Juliana de Sandwich(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1300년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1310년 3월 12일 영국 켄트 웨스트 맬링에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 웨스트 맬링에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: William de Leybourne nasceu aproximadamente 1242, em Leybourne, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele casou-se com Juliana de Sandwich antes 16 de outubro de 1265, em Leybourne, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1300. Ele faleceu em 12 de março de 1310, em West Malling, Kent, Inglaterra, com 69 anos, e foi sepultado em West Malling, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: William de Leybourne родился около 1242 г. в местности либурн, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. Он женился на женщине по имени Juliana de Sandwich перед 16 октябрь 1265 г. в местности либурн, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. В 1300 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 12 марта 1310 г. в местности вест маллинг, кэнт, Англия в возрасте 69 лет и был похоронен в местности вест маллинг, кэнт, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: William de Leybourne nació aproximadamente 1242, en Leybourne, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Se casó con Juliana de Sandwich antes de 16 de octubre de 1265, en Leybourne, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1300. Murió el 12 de marzo de 1310, en West Malling, Kent, Inglaterra, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultado en West Malling, Kent, Inglaterra.
